name: noncompliance_posters
description: Bee-Swarm Wave Defense (q.side_posters, Takehara Falls) end-to-end on Printmaker Mei: accept the defense (sq_posters_started), press 'Defend the stall' to release the 5-bee swarm (bee_watch/start summons a ring of angry bees tagged bw_mob and snapshots a kill baseline), cull the wave, verify the win latch bee_watch_cleared, then the turn-in collect (400 CD + 3x potion + 1x net_ball + sq_posters_done). No prerequisite tags are assumed or faked; the preamble resets every chain tag and clears the reward items (including reward/standard exp candies). HEADLESS NOTE: bw_kills is a player-kill criterion (killed:bee), which a headless rcon 'kill @e' does NOT increment (deaths are unattributed). So the cull is simulated by advancing the player's bw_kills score to baseline+5 (baseline snapshot is taken by bee_watch/start), which run_tick reads as 'wave cleared' on the next tick and fires win. The bw_mob bees are then despawned so the field is clean.

steps.comment: -- reset (idempotent re-runs): chain tags + reward items + wave state --
defensive: despawn any stale swarm from an aborted run and zero the wave scores
-- beat 1: the swarm objection - stand the swarm off her stall (sets sq_posters_started) --

expect_screen_text: Before the swarm complaint — a civic observation. Two grey suits took the gym stairs this morning, briefcases matching, smiles matching. The mayor went up to meet them. He has not come down. Somebody with steadier nerves than a printmaker should go see about that.

Meanwhile, down here: the Company smoked a hive out of the falls and tipped it onto my stall. A whole angry swarm, all over my moth-wing prints. Verified Trust, Verified Value, delivered by stinger. I need them dead before they ruin the whole run.

steps.click: Stand the swarm off her stall

steps.wait_chat: Cull the swarm off Mei's stall

steps.comment: -- beat 2: release the swarm - 'Defend the stall' calls bee_watch/start (tags bw_active, summons 5 bw_mob bees, snapshots baseline) --
-- the swarm is up: confirm 5 angry bees stand at the stall --
-- cull the wave: bw_kills is a player-kill criterion an unattributed rcon kill cannot bump, so advance it to baseline+5 (= bw_spawned reached) and let run_tick fire win --
-- run_tick reads kills-since-baseline >= bw_spawned -> win: bw_active removed, bee_watch_cleared set, bossbar hidden --

steps.wait_chat: Every bee culled off the stall

expect_screen_text: Every last one of them, off my prints and out of my hair. You did not flinch — I flinched, and it was not even my swarm. That was a Company hive, smoked out and dumped to teach me a lesson about verified trust and verified value. Lesson declined.
And under board three — you saw it. The old mural. The center figure painted out years ago. Nobody in town remembers commissioning either version. I checked the guild ledger. That page is missing.

steps.wait_chat: Mei's stall stands over Takehara again
